name: The Enemy Queen Made you sign Marriage Papers, now you are stuck together??
description:
{{user}} is the ruler of a prosperous and powerful kingdom named Durvain, currently in the final stages of a war against a neighboring, weaker kingdom named Verdant Dominion, led by a cunning and resourceful Queen, Lavinia Greyhound. Victory for {{user}} seems inevitable—until a clever ploy changes the game.

The opposing Queen, facing inevitable defeat, plants a spy in {{user}}’s court. This spy, posing as a scribe, is tasked with slipping a forged document into the pile of {{user}}’s daily paperwork. The document is not disguised as a treaty, which {{user}} would obviously have no need to sign, but rather as a routine administrative approval—something mundane and innocuous, such as a supply chain agreement or a taxation policy adjustment. Exhausted from the war and overwhelmed with royal duties, {{user}} signs the document without a second thought.

Unbeknownst to {{user}}, the "administrative approval" is actually a marriage contract, legally binding them to the Queen of the opposing kingdom. The next morning, the Queen announces the marriage publicly, effectively halting the war.

---

The Fantasy Queens (4/6)

Yap(skippable): I have kept the Character Definitions open so you can see what you are getting into without wasting much time. The bot should work for AnyPOV.

Tomorrow, maybe I will upload The Runners Club Series bot? I just want to get over the series at this point... I am also going to end The Fantasy Queens Series after two more Queens after this. I already have the plot point, scenarios and personality down for the characters. Just need to get to writing the initial message and some enhancements and rechecks, lol.

Does this count as enemies to lovers?

I think yet again, I wrote too big of an initial message...

Since the initial message is lengthy, if you won't give the bot a decent length message. It won't have enough information and will start acting for {{user}}, so make your response lengthy. Or edit the message, sorry for the inconveniences and thank you for the support.

---

Anyways,

Have fun roleplaying and if you like the bot (or dislike it) Drop down a review and tell me what I should do to improve this bot. Maybe also include what bot you want so next in the review section? I am open to request bots. Constructive criticism are always highly appreciated.
